title: Technique
description: A badminton technique. Lives at techniques/.../{slug}/{slug}.json — the file whose basename matches its parent dir is the category marker; other files in the dir are sub-technique leaves. Display name resolved via locales (keyed by full path, e.g. 'rearcourt/smash'). Poster is a sibling file with matching basename (e.g. smash.png).

sort_order.description: Explicit display order for the category (lower numbers appear first). Falls back to directory enumeration order if omitted.
